articles.title: Session Timeouts: The Overlooked Accessibility Barrier In Authentication Design
articles.summary: Poorly handled session timeouts are more than a technical inconvenience. They can become serious accessibility barriers that interrupt essential online tasks, especially for people with disabilities. Here is how to implement thoughtful session management that improves usability, reduces frustration, and helps create a more accessible and respectful web.
